title: Systems/Software Engineer I (Entry Level)
description:
This role has been designed as ‘Hybrid’ with an expectation that you will work on average 2 days per week from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\\-to\\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Compute at HPE** 
 helps organizations power their edge\\-to\\-cloud platform with proven, workload\\-optimized products, solutions, and services. Our leading supercomputing technologies enable customers to transform and modernize their IT infrastructure, solve complex problems and support new business opportunities with purpose\\-built infrastructure and software. Join us redefine what’s next for you.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Codes and programs enhancements, updates, and changes for portions and subsystems of systems software, including operating systems, compliers, networking, utilities, databases, and Internet\\-related tools
* Executes established test plans and protocols for assigned portions of code; identifies, logs, and debugs assigned issues.
* Develops understanding of and relationship with internal and outsourced development partners on software systems design and development.
* Participates as a member of project team of other software systems engineers and internal and outsourced development partners to develop reliable, cost effective and high quality solutions for low to moderately\\- complex products.


**What You Need To Bring**
***Education and Experience Required:***
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent
* Typically 0\\-2 years experience


**Knowledge And Skills**
* Experience or understanding of software systems design tools and languages.
* Good analytical and problem solving skills.
* Understanding of design for software systems running on multiple platform types
* Understanding of basic testing, coding, and debugging procedures
* Good written and verbal communication skills; mastery in English and local language.


**Additional Skills**
 Cloud Architectures, Cross Domain Knowledge, Design Thinking, Development Fundamentals, DevOps, Distributed Computing, Microservices Fluency, Full Stack Development, Security\\-First Mindset, Solutions Design, Testing \\& Automation, User Experience (UX)
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \\& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \\& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.

title: Senior Backend / Core Engineer
description:
At Vendia, we’re transforming how companies interact with AI agents. We make AI integration simple, fast, and secure, with built\\-in governance, transparency, and control at every step.
   

  

 We’re looking for a Senior Backend / Core Engineer to help expand and deliver Vendia’s distributed AI data platform. You’ll own critical backend systems, ensuring scalability, availability, latency, and fault tolerance for our massively multi\\-tenant platform. You’ll design, develop, and deliver customer\\-facing functionality that enables enterprise users to manage and share vast amounts of operational data in real time.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Design and implement a cloud\\-based, fully managed data plane at the core of Vendia’s real\\-time distributed data platform.
* Build solutions that allow enterprises to integrate multi\\-modal data at scale
* Implement best practices including automation, CI/CD workflows, testing and quality controls, security, and performance optimization.
* Influence the vision and roadmap of Vendia’s offerings by collaborating with Product and Design teams.
* Partner with leadership to balance new features with rapid customer growth and engineering excellence.


**Minimum Requirements**
* 5\\+ years of software development experience in distributed systems, with operational responsibility for mission\\-critical services.
* Experience with NoSQL databases (e.g., DynamoDB) and serverless cloud architectures (AWS Lambda, API Gateway, Cognito, or equivalents on Azure/GCP).
* Expert in Python or Rust.
* Deep knowledge of AWS, including serverless architectures.
* Proven experience with CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks, and operational excellence.
* Strong project planning, communication, and delivery skills.
* Must be authorized to work in the United States.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Startup or fast\\-paced cloud environment experience.
* Knowledge of Apache Iceberg, distributed ledger technologies, or LLM / AI agent integrations.
* Knowledge of AWS Glue is a plus


**About You**
 At Vendia, all engineers are culturally well\\-rounded:
   

  

* You collaborate and contribute while learning from others.
* You are relentlessly self\\-critical and data\\-driven, holding yourself to high standards.
* You are passionate about building tools and platforms that empower our customers.
* If you’re ready to help build the future of AI governance, we’d love to hear from you.


**About Vendia**
 Vendia is creating the world’s fastest and most scalable platform for creating and running universal applications. Our cloud\\-based, SaaS\\-delivered offering enables application developers to work with real\\-time business data – across companies and clouds. By recreating the speed and ease of a conventional database, we’re tackling the hardest cross\\-cloud sharing challenges so that our customers can focus on what matters most: their business outcomes.
   

  

 Our customers span industries – from automotive and food \\& beverage, to travel, hospitality, and not\\-for\\-profits. They use Vendia to solve challenging data sharing and data integration problems: real\\-time supply chain and logistics tracking, settlement of physical and digital contracts, consolidating the data needed to drive AI/ML inferencing, and more. Our employees helped create industry\\-changing services like AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, API Gateway, and many more. We are taking that expertise and continuing the tradition at Vendia. We build disruptive, innovative technologies that combine the best of Serverless, distributed ledgers, and massively scaled cloud\\-based services that deliver business value to our customers.
   

  

 Vendia is a rapidly growing, minority\\-owned startup headquartered in San Francisco and Seattle, serving the needs of enterprises around the globe. Our recent $15\\.5M Series A investment has enabled us to accelerate our vision of multi\\-party data sharing, and we are growing rapidly. We embrace remote workers but also love interactive development. Our culture is dynamic, with a focus on rapid, iterative delivery and continuous learning from customer engagements. Most importantly, we are a "succeed or fail together" company \\- everyone here plays nicely with each other, a culture we’ve enshrined in our Kind Humans Policy, and a key requirement for all job applicants.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About Us** 




  





 At Neuracore, we're building the world's first robot learning cloud service (https://github.com/NeuracoreAI/neuracore).
 



  





 Our platform eliminates the complexity of traditional robotics development by providing a complete end\\-to\\-end solution for data collection, model training, and deployment that works across different robot types and configurations.
 



  





 Our multidisciplinary team is at the forefront of making robot learning accessible to organisations worldwide, from manufacturing and logistics to healthcare and research institutions. We're transforming how robotics teams develop, train, and deploy intelligent systems by providing cloud\\-native infrastructure that scales from small research projects to enterprise\\-wide robot fleets.
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





 We're looking for a Software Engineer to join our growing team and help shape the technical direction of our platform. In this role, you'll lead the development of critical features across our stack while mentoring engineers and establishing engineering best practices. You'll have the opportunity to make key architectural decisions and drive the technical vision for our product as we scale.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





 \\- Lead the design and development of complex features across our Next.js frontend and FastAPI backend
 



 \\- Architect scalable solutions at the forefront of robotics, AI, and web development
 



 \\- Manage and mentor a small technical team (2\\-4 engineers), providing code reviews, technical guidance, and career development support
 



 \\- Define and implement engineering standards, coding practices, and development workflows
 



 \\- Collaborate closely with product and design teams to translate requirements into technical specifications and delivery plans
 



 \\- Make key technical decisions regarding system architecture, technology choices, and infrastructure strategy
 



 \\- Drive technical initiatives from conception through delivery, ensuring quality and timely execution
 



 \\- Establish and improve CI/CD pipelines, testing strategies, and deployment processes
 



 \\- Participate in technical hiring and team growth activities
 



  





**Requirements:** 




  





 \\- 5\\+ years of professional software development experience
 



 \\- 3\\+ years of experience leading technical projects or managing development teams
 



 \\- Deep expertise in React and Next.js with demonstrated ability to architect complex frontend applications
 



 \\- Strong backend development experience with Python and FastAPI, including API design at scale
 



 \\- Proven track record of making sound architectural decisions and technical trade\\-offs
 



 \\- Experience establishing engineering best practices, code quality standards, and team workflows
 



 \\- Strong understanding of RESTful API design principles and microservices architecture
 



 \\- Hands\\-on experience with cloud services (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and infrastructure as code
 



 \\- Excellent communication skills with ability to explain complex technical concepts to diverse audiences
 



 \\- Experience with CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and modern deployment strategies
 



 \\- (Preferred) Previous experience in a startup or high\\-growth environment
 



 \\- (Preferred) Background in robotics, machine learning infrastructure, or edge computing

title: AI Engineer
description:
**About Drooid** 




 Drooid is an AI\\-powered development studio that builds software products. We embed with companies to prove AI works — fast, lean POCs that show real ROI before you scale.
 



  





 Location: Fully Remote (US and India)
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We're looking for an AI Engineer who lives at the intersection of prompt engineering, web development, and mobile app development. You'll use AI tools and platforms (Claude, GPT, Cursor, Bolt, v0, etc.) to build complete, production\\-ready applications — fast.
 



  





 This is not a traditional software engineering role. We need someone who thinks in prompts, understands how to get the best output from AI coding assistants, and can ship full\\-stack products using AI\\-first workflows.
 



  





**Must have:** 



* Send us a portfolio of products that you have created using AI



  





**What You'll Do** 



* Build websites and mobile apps end\\-to\\-end using AI\\-powered development tools
* Craft and optimize prompts for code generation, UI design, and application logic
* Work with clients to understand requirements and translate them into AI\\-built solutions
* Develop and maintain prompt libraries and AI workflows for repeatable, high\\-quality output
* Integrate AI agents and automation into client products
* Prototype and ship MVPs and POCs rapidly for client engagements



  





**What We're Looking For** 



* Strong prompt engineering skills — you know how to get great code out of AI tools
* Familiarity with AI coding tools like Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude, GPT, Bolt, v0, or similar
* Ability to evaluate and debug AI\\-generated code
* Understanding of full\\-stack development concepts (APIs, databases, deployment)
* Self\\-starter who thrives in a fast\\-paced, remote environment
* Excellent communication skills



  





**Nice to Have** 



* Experience with agentic AI frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen)
* Background in cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices
* Experience with legacy system modernization
* Portfolio of AI\\-built projects



  





**Why Drooid?** 



* Work on the cutting edge of AI\\-powered development
* Fully remote — work from anywhere in the US or India
* Small team, big impact — your work ships to real clients immediately
* Learn and grow fast in a startup environment
* Competitive compensation



  





 Apply now and help us build the future of software development.
